---
description: "Use when creating or updating assignment reports, task documentation, or README files for HW1 tasks. Enforces one report per task, strict naming, and concise relevant sections only."
name: "HW1 Task Report Rules"
---
# HW1 Task Report Rules

Apply these rules whenever you create or update task reports for this repository.

- Create or update exactly one report per task.
- Use only this report filename pattern: `README_task<number>.md`.
- Do not create any additional report files for the same task.
- Keep each report clear and simple.
- Include only sections that are relevant to HW1 instructions.
- Exclude unrelated explanations, extra background, or duplicate content.

## Scope

- These rules apply to task reports for Task 1, Task 2, Task 3, and Task 4.
- If an existing report uses a different name, migrate content into `README_task<number>.md` and avoid keeping parallel report files.
